title: Stressed Out
why_this_song: Stressed Out by Twenty One Pilots (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "A stone's throw from a creek we used to roam"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I wish I found some better sounds no one's ever heard"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "We used to play pretend, give each other different names"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "We used to play pretend, give each other different names"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I wish I had a better voice that sang some better words"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "used" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "used" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wish" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "wish" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Wish we could turn back time
Out of student loans and treehouse homes
Saying, "Wake up, you need to make money"

exercises.prompt_en: "Stressed Out" was released in 2015. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Stressed Out" foi lançada em 2015. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Stressed Out" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Stressed Out" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
